hero.titulo: Autonomous public safety on your existing camera network.
hero.subtitulo: We turn cameras that only record into a system that detects, alerts, and dispatches aerial response in real time.

problema.titulo: Urban cameras record — but they don't prevent.
problema.descripcion: Most municipalities already have dozens or hundreds of IP cameras installed. The bottleneck isn't infrastructure — it's that no one can watch all the screens all the time. By the time evidence is reviewed, the crime is already over.
puntos: Reactive response: patrol arrives after the fact
Existing cameras with no intelligent use

solucion.titulo: AI over the existing network + automated aerial response.
solucion.descripcion: We connect our detection engine to existing IP cameras (RTSP/ONVIF) and activate a response drone when an active threat is detected.

pasos.descripcion: AI analyzes every camera simultaneously. No shifts, no breaks.
Classifies the event (weapon, crowd, intrusion) and notifies control within seconds.
If policy allows, a drone automatically takes off to the GPS coordinates.
Operator receives live video and authorizes the next action.

beneficios.descripcion: Time between detection and drone on target.
One operator covers what used to require 10.
We don't replace cameras. We empower them.

cta.titulo: Do you lead a municipality or work in public safety?
cta.descripcion: Schedule a pilot demo over a zone in your district. No commitment.

hero.titulo: Autonomous defense for large properties beyond human reach.
hero.subtitulo: Drones with programmed patrols and perimeter turrets that run 24/7 without permanent night guards.

problema.titulo: Guarding hectares with people doesn't scale.
problema.descripcion: Mines, agribusinesses, factories, and large depots share the same challenge: the perimeter is too vast for guards alone, and every night shift costs.
puntos: Remote zones with no physical coverage

solucion.descripcion: We combine autonomous-route drones with fixed turrets at critical perimeter points, all supervised from a single control post.

pasos.descripcion: The drone runs automated rounds on defined GPS coordinates.
Invisible lines on the ground; any crossing triggers an alert.
Detection and deterrent response at perimeter accesses.
One operator coordinates drones + turrets + cameras from one dashboard.

beneficios.descripcion: No shifts, no breaks, no absenteeism.
One operator replaces multiple physical patrols.
Aerial presence and instant response lower incidents before they occur.

cta.descripcion: Tell us the perimeter size and we'll design a patrol + turret configuration for your case.

hero.titulo: Autonomous defense when the store is closed.
hero.subtitulo: Virtual perimeter fences with admitted hours: the system knows when no one should be there — and acts.

problema.descripcion: Malls, large stores, and logistics warehouses concentrate all value inside — but active surveillance only happens during business hours. At night, the physical fence is no longer enough.
puntos: After-hours break-ins with the store empty
Alarm rings but response arrives 15-30 min later

solucion.descripcion: The system knows the store's legitimate hours. Any movement outside that window activates the autonomous turret and alerts the operator.

pasos.descripcion: Configure windows when staff is allowed. Anything outside is anomalous by default.
Digital lines over the store's perimeter, calibrated by software.
The turret emits a deterrent signal (light/audio) before escalating.
If the intruder persists, the remote operator decides with live video.

beneficios.titulo: Covers when no one else does
beneficios.descripcion: The most vulnerable window — covered by default.
The system stands down during normal operating hours.
Records, alerts, and acts. Three layers in one system.

cta.titulo: Does your store sit empty at night?
cta.descripcion: We design your virtual-fence and admitted-hours configuration on top of your real layout.
